title: Infrastructure Plus
description: Infrastructure Plus is a mod focused on realistic infrastructure and urban development in Minecraft. It continuously expands the game with new building assets for detailed and authentic environments. (Best use as MTR Addon)
body:
![Mod Text Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ffc482f49332f479c32246d2cc65b42e3a517e80.png)
---
# 🏗️ Infrastructure Plus 🏗️

Infrastructure Plus is a building-focused Minecraft mod that expands the game with infrastructure assets designed for realistic cities, transportation networks, public spaces, and large-scale urban projects.

Unlike vanilla Minecraft, which offers only a limited selection of blocks suitable for modern infrastructure, Infrastructure Plus provides specialized building assets created specifically for roads, transit systems, tunnels, stations, utilities, and urban environments.

Whether you're building a small town, a modern metropolis, a realistic railway network, a bus system, a tram corridor, or an entire transportation hub, Infrastructure Plus gives you additional tools to bring your projects to life.

---

# 🚧 Features 🚧

### 🛣️ Road Infrastructure

Create realistic roads, streets, and transportation corridors using dedicated infrastructure building assets and road surface variants.

### 🚇 Tunnel Construction

Build modern and legacy-style tunnel entrances, underground corridors, and transportation tunnels with specialized tunnel components.

### 🚏 Public Transportation Support

Infrastructure Plus includes transportation-oriented assets that complement bus, tram, metro, subway, and railway projects.

### 🎨 Builder-Friendly Design

Designed primarily for builders, city projects, transportation enthusiasts, roleplay maps, and server communities that want more realistic urban environments.

### 🧩 Flexible Integration

Works perfectly as a standalone building mod and alongside transportation and city-building mods.

---

# 🚆 Perfect Companion for MTR 🚆

Infrastructure Plus pairs especially well with Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR).

By combining both mods, players can create more immersive stations, rail corridors, transit hubs, urban districts, and transportation networks while maintaining a realistic appearance.

---

# 🌍 Why Download Infrastructure Plus? 🌍

Minecraft offers endless creativity, but modern infrastructure has always been one of the more difficult things to build convincingly using vanilla blocks alone.

Infrastructure Plus aims to solve that problem by providing dedicated infrastructure assets designed specifically for realistic construction projects.

Whether you're building:

* 🏙️ Modern Cities
* 🚇 Metro & Subway Networks
* 🚊 Tram Systems
* 🚌 Bus Routes & Terminals
* 🚂 Railway Corridors
* 🏭 Industrial Areas
* 🏢 Urban Developments
* 🎭 Roleplay Servers
* 🌎 Real-World Recreations

Infrastructure Plus helps bring those projects to life with greater detail and realism.

---

# 🔄 Long-Term Development 🔄

Many infrastructure-focused Minecraft mods eventually stop receiving updates, forcing builders to search for alternatives or leave projects unfinished.

Infrastructure Plus is being developed as a long-term project with the goal of continuously expanding its content library, supporting newer Minecraft versions whenever possible, and providing builders with a reliable infrastructure-building experience for years to come.

---

# 🗺️ Future Plans 🗺️

Planned additions include:

* 🚦 Additional road infrastructure
* 🚉 Railway infrastructure assets
* ⚡ Utility infrastructure
* 🚧 Construction & safety equipment
* 🪑 Street furniture and urban decorations
* 🌍 International infrastructure styles
* 🚍 Additional transportation-related assets

Infrastructure Plus is actively developed and will continue to grow with future updates.

---

# ❤️ Community & Feedback ❤️

Infrastructure Plus is still growing, and community feedback plays an important role in its development.

Suggestions, ideas, bug reports, and feature requests are always welcome and help shape future updates.

---

### ⚠️ Creative Mode Only ⚠️

Infrastructure Plus is currently intended for use in Creative Mode only. Most blocks and assets do not yet have crafting recipes and are therefore not obtainable through normal Survival gameplay. Survival support may be added in a future update, but there is currently no planned release date.
